languages.text: В недрах этой окровавленной гробницы канули Себериан и его меч. И все же он не мог сгинуть бесследно.

traits.locale_text: В недрах этой окровавленной гробницы канули Себериан и его меч. И все же он не мог сгинуть бесследно.

languages.text: Seberian and his sword vanished deep within this blood-drenched tomb. But he could not have perished without a trace.
languages.original_text: В недрах этой окровавленной гробницы канули Себериан и его меч. И все же он не мог сгинуть бесследно.

traits.locale_text: Deep within this blood-drenched tomb, Seberian and his sword have vanished. Yet, he could not have perished without a trace.
Deep within this blood-drenched tomb, Seberian and his sword have vanished. Yet, he could not have perished without a trace.
Seberian and his sword vanished deep within this blood-drenched tomb. But he could not have perished without a trace.
Seberian and his sword vanished deep within this blood-drenched tomb. But he could not have perished without a trace.

languages.text: Seberian und sein Schwert sind in den Tiefen dieser blutgetränkten Gruft verschwunden. Aber er kann sich nicht in Nichts aufgelöst haben.
languages.original_text: Seberian and his sword vanished deep within this blood-drenched tomb. But he could not have perished without a trace.

traits.locale_text: Seberian und sein Schwert sind in den Tiefen dieser blutgetränkten Gruft verschwunden. Aber er kann sich nicht in Nichts aufgelöst haben.

languages.text: Seberian et son épée se sont évanouis dans les profondeurs de cette tombe ensanglantée. Cependant, il a forcément laissé des traces.
languages.original_text: Seberian and his sword vanished deep within this blood-drenched tomb. But he could not have perished without a trace.

traits.locale_text: Seberian et son épée se sont évanouis dans les profondeurs de cette tombe ensanglantée. Cependant, il a forcément laissé des traces.

languages.text: 塞贝里安和他的宝剑在浸满鲜血的墓穴深处消失了。但他绝不可能就这么人间蒸发。
languages.original_text: Seberian and his sword vanished deep within this blood-drenched tomb. But he could not have perished without a trace.

traits.locale_text: 塞贝里安和他的宝剑在浸满鲜血的墓穴深处消失了。但他绝不可能就这么人间蒸发。

languages.text: Seberian y su espada se esfumaron en el interior de esta tumba ensangrentada, pero no moriría sin haber dejado rastro.
languages.original_text: Seberian and his sword vanished deep within this blood-drenched tomb. But he could not have perished without a trace.

traits.locale_text: Seberian y su espada se esfumaron en el interior de esta tumba ensangrentada, pero no moriría sin haber dejado rastro.

languages.text: 血塗られた墓の奥深くで、セベリアンと彼の剣は消えていた。しかし、跡形もなく消えてしまったわけではない。
languages.original_text: In the depths of that bloody tomb, Seberian and his sword were gone. But he could not be lost without a trace.

languages.text: Seberian ve kılıcı, bu kana bulanmış mezarın derinliklerinde kayboldu. Fakat arkasında hiçbir iz bırakmadan ölmüş olamaz.
languages.original_text: Seberian and his sword vanished deep within this blood-drenched tomb. But he could not have perished without a trace.

traits.locale_text: Seberian ve kılıcı, bu kana bulanmış mezarın derinliklerinde kayboldu. Fakat arkasında hiçbir iz bırakmadan ölmüş olamaz.
